summary: Completed comprehensive testing of redesigned Analytics dashboard (100% fee-focused). All backend endpoints (7 new tests) and frontend features verified. Old analytics (attendance/homework/exam/teacher/admissions) successfully removed from Analytics page.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/analytics/fees returns correct structure (kpis with 10 keys, daily array, monthly array with 12 items, by_mode object, by_class array)
BACKEND: /api/analytics/fees respects class_id filter (filtered transactions <= all transactions)
BACKEND: /api/analytics/fees respects payment_mode filter (only selected mode in by_mode)
BACKEND: /api/analytics/fees with empty date range returns 0s (not error)
BACKEND: GET /api/analytics/student/{id}/fee-report returns student profile, summary (8 fields), line_items, payments
BACKEND: GET /api/analytics/student/{id}/fee-report.pdf returns application/pdf blob (2705 bytes)
BACKEND: RBAC - parent can access own student fee report, gets 403 for other students
FRONTEND: Analytics page title 'Fees Analytics' visible
FRONTEND: Sticky filter bar present with data-testid='analytics-filter-bar'
FRONTEND: 8 date preset buttons present (Today, Yesterday, Last 7 Days, Last 30 Days, This Month, Last Month, Current Session, Custom)
FRONTEND: Date presets work correctly - Today sets same start/end, Last 30 Days sets 30-day range, Current Session sets April 1 to March 31
FRONTEND: 8 KPI cards display (Total Collected, Pending, Students Paid, Students Pending, Today's Collection, This Month, Discounts, Late Fees)
FRONTEND: 4 charts render correctly (Daily Collection bar, Payment Method Breakdown pie, Monthly Collection Trend line, Class-wise Collection horizontal bar) - 46 SVG elements found
FRONTEND: Class filter dropdown works - selecting a class refreshes analytics data
FRONTEND: Payment Mode filter works - selecting 'Cash' refreshes analytics data
FRONTEND: Student Fee Search - autocomplete works, typing 'aarav' returns 2 results, selecting student loads profile
FRONTEND: Student profile displays correctly - Student Information card, Fee Summary card with status badge, Payment History table with 6 payments
FRONTEND: Outstanding Balance banner displays when balance > 0 (₹32,100.00 pending, 481 days overdue)
FRONTEND: Student report download buttons present (PDF, CSV) in search card header
FRONTEND: Collection report download buttons present (PDF, Excel, CSV) in filter bar
FRONTEND: NO old analytics terms found in main content (attendance rate, homework completion, exam performance, teacher analytics, admission trend removed)
FRONTEND: Sticky filter bar remains visible when scrolling
REGRESSION: Analytics link present in sidebar with data-testid='nav-analytics'
REGRESSION: Dashboard page loads correctly
REGRESSION: Students page loads correctly
REGRESSION: Reports page loads correctly

success_percentage.backend: 100% (70/70 tests passed, including 7 new analytics endpoints)
